reviews.address: 36 Buckingham Palace Rd, London SW1W 0RE, United Kingdom
reviews.review_text: We ordered one of the chicken burgers and the kimchi burger, and they were spectacular. We also had the prawns as a starter and had the burgers with fries. Probably the best smash burger I've ever had. Can't wait to go back to London to have it again.

reviews.address: Av. del Stadium, 39005 Santander, Cantabria, Spain
reviews.review_text: A beautiful store with accessories made with exceptional taste and delicacy. You can clearly see the craftsmanship behind each piece: everything is carefully thought out and has that unique touch you can't find anywhere else. Plus, they're very friendly and attentive, patiently advising you, and it makes the shopping experience special. Without a doubt, a place I 100% recommend.
reviews.owner_response: Muchas gracias por dedicar tu tiempo a dejar esta reseña Thank you so much for taking the time to leave this review.

reviews.address: C. de Guzmán el Bueno, 45, Chamberí, 28015 Madrid, Spain
reviews.review_text: I ordered a custom cake for my birthday and it was a great choice. I had a specific idea in mind, which they understood perfectly, and it tasted delicious. Highly recommended!
reviews.owner_response: ¡Gracias por tu reseña María! Una alegría que te haya gustado tu tarta, te esperamos para la próxima celebración. Thank you for your review, Maria! We're so glad you liked your cake, and we hope to see you at the next celebration.

reviews.address: Carrer de Pujades, 187, Sant Martí, 08005 Barcelona, Spain
reviews.review_text: We went for lunch as a large group of 26 during our trip to Barcelona and were delighted with the service and the quality of the food. They were very accommodating in organizing everything, given the size of our group. We highly recommend trying the duck rice and the vegetable rice!

reviews.address: Calle de Antonio López, 44, Carabanchel, 28019 Madrid, Spain
reviews.review_text: A very good pharmacy; I always find what I need, and they've recently expanded their dermocosmetics section. They have new products from excellent brands that you can't find everywhere. Plus, the staff is very attentive and friendly. It's a pleasure to go there!
reviews.owner_response: Muchas gracias María. Cuando quieras estás invitada a una sesión de asesoramiento de dermo.  Thank you so much, Maria. You're welcome to a dermo consultation session anytime.

reviews.review_text: Excellent customer service and very professional. I will definitely be back.

reviews.address: C. de Blasco de Garay, 10, local izquierdo, Chamberí, 28015 Madrid, Spain
reviews.review_text: Simply a place worth going back to. Incredible flavors with unexpected but brilliant combinations. My favorite was the K-pop, which I highly recommend everyone try.
reviews.owner_response: Ey María, mil gracias. Nos ha encantado tu reseña por magmánima. Tú no recomiendas, tú recomiendas \ . En plan a 5 a continentes. A los casi 200 países del mundo. A los 8000 y pico de millones de la tierra. Y nos parece bien, María, qué te vamos a decir. De hecho, nos vamos a poner farrucos y te vamos a dar las gracias en nombre de todos los habitantes del planeta azul. Fuerte abrazo, María. Hasta pronto! Hey María, thank you so much. We loved your review, so magnanimous. You don't recommend it, you recommend it \  Like, five continents. To the almost 200 countries in the world. To the 8 billion-odd ones on Earth. And we're fine with it, María, what can we say? In fact, we're going to get all up in arms and thank you on behalf of all the inhabitants of the blue planet. Big hug, María. See you soon!

reviews.address: 93 Bd Voltaire, 75011 Paris, France
reviews.review_text:
In addition to asking us for an exorbitant price for work he didn't do because he couldn't open the door, the locksmith repeatedly threatened to kill us, scaring us. I don't recommend using this service.

Edit after response:
I sent you an email on Monday (it's been 5 days) to which I still haven't received a response, with all the invoices and the conversation with the locksmith. I see you respond to reviews but not to emails. Enough with the threats, please. I just want no one else to fall for your scam.
reviews.owner_response:
Madame, Monsieur,

Nous vous rappelons que vous êtes bien conscient de ne pas disposer de facture prouvant que vous avez eu recours à nos services, car, en réalité, vous n’avez jamais fait appel à notre entreprise, Point Forteresse.

En conséquence de la campagne de dénigrement que vous avez lancée à notre égard, nous avons déjà procédé au dépôt d’une plainte en ligne et nous déposerons une plainte physique auprès des autorités compétentes dès lundi.

Nous vous remercions de prendre cette situation avec sérieux, car nous ne tolérons en aucun cas des avis ou commentaires fallacieux portant atteinte à notre réputation.

Salutations distinguées,
 Dear Sir/Madam,

We would like to remind you that you are well aware that you do not have an invoice proving that you used our services, because, in fact, you have never used our company, Point Forteresse.

As a result of the smear campaign you have launched against us, we have already filed an online complaint and will be filing a formal complaint with the appropriate authorities on Monday.

We thank you for taking this situation seriously, as we will not tolerate any false or damaging reviews or comments that harm our reputation.

Sincerely,

reviews.address: 2, 182 Thambiligahawatta, Dikwella 81200, Sri Lanka
8CXX+H3C, No 76, kurundankulama, 4th Lane, Kandy Road, Kurundankulama 50000, Sri Lanka
reviews.review_text:
My partner and I spent one night in Anuradhapura. The hotel is incredible, the facilities are excellent, and the pool is very well maintained. The food (we had breakfast, lunch, and dinner) was delicious, with special mention to the breakfast. The service was very attentive and helped us find a driver who took us from the airport to the hotel and the next day to our next destination, taking us on a route where we saw elephants.
In short, highly recommended.

reviews.address: C/ dels Cavallers, 42, Ciutat Vella, 46001 València, Valencia, Spain
reviews.review_text: The food was just okay. The service was friendly but confused among the staff.

reviews.address: C. de Claudio Coello, 32, Salamanca, 28001 Madrid, Spain
reviews.review_text: I bought a cape for a wedding I have this month, and due to a stock error, a week later they notified me that I wouldn't be able to receive the order and that they would refund my money. No further explanation, a week's delay, and I had nothing to wear. I won't be buying from them again.
reviews.owner_response:
Hola Maria,
Lo sentimos mucho, pero el stock a veces es incontrolable. Porque tenemos el stock de web conectado con tiendas y a veces se vende a la ve. En la web lo avisamos previamente en nuestras condiciones de compra. De hecho es una de nuestras bases legales, y de todas las tiendas online. Se puede leer en nuestras bases legales:
\ , null, [0, 164]], [ All orders are subject to the availability of the selected products. If any difficulties arise due to a stock error, we will contact you as soon as possible and try to obtain the item you purchased as quickly as possible.
If we are unable to obtain the selected item, we will refund the price of the item.\

reviews.address: Av. Manuel García Lago, 4, 39005 Santander, Cantabria, Spain
reviews.review_text: Spectacular views, but exorbitant prices. Two double beers for €10.40 don't seem reasonable (and they don't even give you chips or olives to go with it). Clearly, with those prices, I won't go back.
reviews.owner_response:
Lamentamos que hayas tenido esa impresión sobre los precios. Entendemos que las expectativas y experiencias pueden variar. 

Nuestro objetivo es ofrecer una experiencia de calidad en un entorno privilegiado como el que ofrecemos en el Parque de Trueba. Los precios que establecemos están en consonancia con la ubicación y los estándares de calidad que mantenemos. Apreciamos tu feedback y esperamos que, a pesar de este aspecto, hayas disfrutado de otros aspectos de tu visita.

 ¡Gracias por tu comprensión! We regret that you had that impression regarding the prices. We understand that expectations and experiences can vary.

Our goal is to offer a quality experience in a privileged setting like the one we offer in Trueba Park. The prices we set are in line with the location and the quality standards we maintain. We appreciate your feedback and hope that, despite this issue, you enjoyed other aspects of your visit.

Thank you for your understanding!

reviews.address: P.º de la Castellana, 36, Salamanca, 28046 Madrid, Spain
reviews.review_text:
I went to Tatel with my colleagues to celebrate Christmas dinner.
First, I made the reservation by phone months in advance. They told me I had to get back to them via email, which I never received, to confirm the reservation. When I didn't receive it, I called again and was told not to worry, as the reservation was confirmed. I called again 20 days later and was told they didn't have any reservations and that they didn't have room for that many people that day. However, after explaining everything, they finally managed to give me a table.

When we arrived, they made us wait (at the crowded bar) for over 20 minutes to give us our table, which wasn't ready. It took them quite a while to serve us. The music was excessively loud, so we had to shout to hear each other. We asked the waiter if they could turn the music down a bit, but despite being told they could, they didn't. We also ordered wine and a bottle of water to drink. They refilled all our water once the bottle was empty without asking if we wanted more, which left us with a €56 bill for eight bottles of water.

At the end of dinner, we asked for a glass of water, but they weren't considerate enough to tell us they would close 20 minutes after serving it, so we couldn't finish it.

For all these reasons, I would consider dining at Tatel again.

reviews.address: Rúa da Porta da Pena, 17, 15704 Santiago de Compostela, A Coruña, Spain
reviews.review_text: I stayed at this hotel with some colleagues for three nights. The service and kindness we received were incredible. They helped us with everything, even adjusting the breakfast schedule since we had a conference to attend and were short on time. The terrace of the café-bar is beautiful and very welcoming. If I return to Santiago, I will definitely return to this hotel.
reviews.owner_response:
Muchas gracias María por tomarte tu tiempo para redactar y compartir esta bonita reseña. Realmente es un placer atender a personas como vosotras y no lo digo por cortesía, así lo sentimos todo el equipo. Vuestra actitud durante la estancia no pudo haber sido mejor a pesar de las horribles condiciones atmosféricas. Ni te imaginas lo que ayuda eso en el trabajo. Sois gente empática y luminosa. Que todo os vaya lo mejor posible!
Gracias! Thank you so much, Maria, for taking the time to write and share this lovely review. It's truly a pleasure to serve people like you, and I don't say that out of politeness; the whole team feels the same way. Your attitude during our stay couldn't have been better, despite the awful weather conditions. You can't imagine how much that helps us at work. You are such empathetic and wonderful people. We wish you all the best!

Thank you!
